# Nightly-review rotation manifest.
#
# One subsystem doc per line. The nightly-review workflow picks tonight's
# subsystem by (UTC-day-of-year - 1) mod (line count), so coverage cycles
# through the whole list roughly once a month. Blank lines and lines starting
# with '#' are ignored.
#
# To add a subsystem to the rotation, add its docs/*.md path here. The doc is
# the source of truth for which code the agent reads (docs-first protocol).
# Order is stable on purpose -- don't reshuffle, just append.

docs/flight-physics.md
docs/aircraft-performance.md
docs/aircraft-data-model.md
docs/phases.md
docs/approach-and-pattern-geometry.md
docs/landing-and-runway-exit.md
docs/ground-layout-generation.md
docs/navigation-database.md
docs/command-pipeline.md
docs/command-handlers.md
docs/command-input-ux.md
docs/conflict-and-visual-detection.md
docs/scenario-loading-and-generation.md
docs/hold-for-release.md
docs/solo-training-evaluation.md
docs/solo-training-pilot-speech.md
docs/speech-recognition-pipeline.md
docs/track-sharing-and-consolidation.md
docs/crc-display-state.md
docs/training-hub-contract.md
docs/server-rooms-and-hub.md
docs/client-mainviewmodel.md
docs/radar-rendering.md
docs/flight-strips.md
docs/weather-and-wind.md
docs/airspace-database.md
docs/snapshots-and-replay.md
docs/tick-loop.md
docs/minimum-vectoring-altitude.md
docs/logging.md
